product: Genie column selection and query improvements
tagline: Improved column selection accuracy: Genie's ability to choose relevant columns based on user prompts has been improved, especially when the prompt contains a specific column value.
what_it_does: Improved column selection accuracy: Genie's ability to choose relevant columns based on user prompts has been improved, especially when the prompt contains a specific column value. Cross geo processing error fix: Resolved an issue where customers based in Australia would receive a cross geo processing error. Query execution timeout: Genie now automatically cancels query executions that take longer than 15 minutes to execute.
why_it_matters: Improved column selection accuracy: Genie's ability to choose relevant columns based on user prompts has been improved, especially when the prompt contains a specific column value.
